instruction: Open Safari and navigate the active tab to {URL}.
source: adapted:webarena:1 mode=port; WebArena navigates a Playwright page to a start_url; the cross-platform intent (drive a browser tab to a URL) maps to Safari, whose active-tab URL is read via Tier-C AppleScript (url_in, WebArena gold-in-pred)

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to make new document with properties {URL:"{URL}"}' -e 'delay 1' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Safari" to return URL of front document
